content.json:
# Syslog Traffic — Network Appliance (Firewall / Router) Parsing
**Theme:** Syslog traffic monitoring · **Data source:** `Syslog` (local0–local7 facilities used by network gear).

Extracts deny/drop messages, interface link-flaps, and recurring message patterns from router/firewall syslog.

> `has_any` keyword lists are starting points — extend to match your vendors' message strings.

content.query: Syslog | where Facility startswith 'local' | summarize Events=count() by Computer, Facility | top 100 by Events desc
content.title: Appliance events by host & facility (local0-7)

content.query: Syslog | where SyslogMessage has_any ('deny', 'denied', 'drop', 'dropped', 'blocked', 'reject') | summarize Count=count() by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | render timechart
content.title: Deny / drop / blocked messages over time

content.query: Syslog | where SyslogMessage has_any ('link down', 'link up', 'line protocol', 'interface', 'LINK-3', 'LINEPROTO') | summarize Count=count() by Computer, SyslogMessage | top 100 by Count desc
content.title: Interface up/down & link-flap messages

content.query: Syslog | extend MsgPattern=replace_regex(SyslogMessage, @'[0-9]+', 'N') | summarize Count=count() by MsgPattern | top 50 by Count desc
content.title: Top recurring message patterns
